# Dotfiles

Arch Linux configuration with [Hyprland](https://hypr.land/), themed using [Matugen](https://github.com/InioX/matugen) to generate **Material You**-based colors from your wallpaper.

<br>

## 📝 TODO

- [ ] Fix SwayNC.

<br>

## 🖼️ Showcase

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/67947a03-c216-45c9-9c7c-83a172e2590b

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7cd3b1b5-f198-4e73-9874-f730d4a72208

> [!NOTE]
> The images below demonstrate how the color palette adapts to different wallpapers. Colors are automatically generated by **Matugen** based on the current wallpaper.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> You can add any wallpaper to the **waypaper** menu by moving it to `dotfiles/wallpapers/`.

## 📂 Getting the files

Clone the repository into your home directory:

```bash
cd ~ && git clone "https://github.com/DimitryGonzales/dotfiles.git"
```

<br>

## 📦 Required depencencies

- `git`
- `sudo`

<br>

## ⚙️ Installation

> [!WARNING]
> Scripts are currently under development.

> [!CAUTION]
> This will **overwrite** any existing dotfiles with the same names in your directories.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Choose one of the following options:**

### Option 1: Dotfiles only

Run the `install.sh` script to install only the dotfiles and required software:

```bash
~/dotfiles/install.sh
```

### Option 2: Full setup

Run the `setup.sh` script for a complete system setup including **display manager**, **window manager**, **apps**, **tools**, and more:

```bash
~/dotfiles/setup.sh
```
